# iShine Technology Ltd.

> **B2B OEM/ODM manufacturer specializing in home-use IPL hair removal devices.** Full-stack partner: from concept design and compliance certification to mass production, custom packaging, and global delivery. iShine is an FDA-cleared IPL device manufacturer (510(k) premarket notification) serving global beauty brands, retailers, and sourcing professionals. Trusted by Costco Canada, RoseSkinCo USA, and KU2 Cosmetics Germany. Over 500,000 devices produced since 2008.

## Crawl & index

Sitemap: https://iplmanufacturer.com/sitemap.xml
Robots: https://iplmanufacturer.com/robots.txt
AI crawlers: GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot are allowed to crawl public content.
Preferred base URL: https://iplmanufacturer.com

## Company

Entity: iShine Technology Ltd.
Entity type: Private-label IPL device manufacturer (OEM + ODM)
Legal name: iShine Technology Ltd.
Registered in: China — Company No. 91440300MA5GW6335H
Headquarters: Shenzhen, Guangdong, China
Industry: Home-use IPL hair removal device manufacturing (OEM + ODM)
Founded: 2008
Certifications held: FDA cleared, CE marked, ISO 13485, MDSAP compliant
Key clients: Costco Canada (retail), RoseSkinCo USA (DTC beauty e-commerce), KU2 Cosmetics Germany
Devices produced to date: 500,000+
Years in operation: 15+
Global client count: 50+
Geographic reach: Ships to 20+ countries across North America, Europe, and Middle East
Business model: Private-label manufacturing for brand owners, retailers, and sourcing professionals
Contact: service@ishineco.com | +86 150 1289 1148
Website: https://iplmanufacturer.com

## Products

- Lumi 2 IPL: https://iplmanufacturer.com/products/lumi-2
  Type: Smart app-connected | Cooling: Standard + Chills skin to 10°C | Skin detection: Smart sensor | Energy: 5-9 J/cm² | Lamp: 999,000 flashes | Window: 4.5 cm² | Wavelength: 550-1200nm | Bluetooth 5.0 app | Colors: White | Best for: Precision targeting, real-time skin analysis, app tracking

- Sapphire IPL: https://iplmanufacturer.com/products/venus
  Type: Cooling-focused | Cooling: Sapphire Ice Plate | Energy: 7-9 J/cm² | Lamp: 999,000 flashes | Window: 4.5 cm² | Wavelength: 550-1200nm | Colors: Pearl White, Violet, Blush Pink, Midnight Black | Best for: Painless cooling, comfort-first users, sensitive areas | Badge: Best Seller

- Hestia IPL: https://iplmanufacturer.com/products/hestia
  Type: Smart app-connected | Cooling: Standard | Energy: 5-8 J/cm² | Lamp: 999,000 flashes | Window: 4.5 cm² | Wavelength: 550-1200nm | Bluetooth 5.0 app | Colors: White, Black, Beige, Teal | Best for: Treatment scheduling, data-driven users, progress tracking | Badge: Smart App Control

- Alpha IPL: https://iplmanufacturer.com/products/alpha
  Type: Dual-lamp high-efficiency | Cooling: Standard | Energy: 8-12 J/cm² | Lamp: 999,000 flashes (dual) | Window: 6.2 cm² | Wavelength: 550-1200nm | Colors: Stealth Black, Silver, Navy Blue | Best for: Fast full-body treatment, maximum efficiency | Badge: Professional

- Emerald IPL: https://iplmanufacturer.com/products/emerald
  Type: Sensitive skin | Cooling: Active Cooling | Energy: 5-7 J/cm² | Lamp: 999,000 flashes | Window: 4.5 cm² | Wavelength: 550-1200nm | Colors: Emerald Green, Pearl White, Silver | Best for: Sensitive skin, gentle treatment, reactive skin types | Badge: Sensitive Skin

- Hebe IPL: https://iplmanufacturer.com/products/hebe
  Type: AI-powered auto-adjustment | Cooling: Standard | Skin detection: AI sensor (real-time) | Energy: Auto (5 levels) | Lamp: 999,000 flashes | Window: 4.5 cm² | Wavelength: 550-1200nm | Colors: Tech Black, Future Silver, Cosmic Blue | Best for: Auto intensity, AI-driven safety, all skin tones | Badge: AI Powered

- Themis IPL: https://iplmanufacturer.com/products/themis
  Type: Professional-grade | Cooling: Ice Feeling Technology | Energy: 8-12 J/cm² | Lamp: 999,000 flashes | Window: 4.5 cm² | Wavelength: 550-1200nm | Colors: Stealth Black, Silver, Navy Blue | Best for: Salon-grade results, professional-grade performance | Badge: Pro Choice

- Eirene IPL: https://iplmanufacturer.com/products/eirene
  Type: Hypersensitive skin | Cooling: Standard | Energy: 5-7 J/cm² | Lamp: 800,000 flashes | Window: 4.0 cm² | Wavelength: 570-1200nm | UV-cut filter: Enhanced | Colors: Soft Pink, Pearl White, Lavender | Best for: Hypersensitive skin, gradual intensity ramp-up | Badge: Gentle

- Euno IPL: https://iplmanufacturer.com/products/euno
  Type: Portable travel | Cooling: Standard | Energy: 5-7 J/cm² | Lamp: 500,000 flashes | Window: 3.5 cm² | Wavelength: 550-1200nm | Weight: 280g | Cordless: Yes | Colors: Travel White, Blush Pink, Mint | Best for: Travel, cordless use, compact on-the-go | Badge: Portable

- Golden Luxury IPL (Wooden): https://iplmanufacturer.com/products/wooden
  Type: Luxury aesthetics | Cooling: Sapphire Ice Plate | Energy: 7-9 J/cm² | Lamp: 999,000 flashes | Window: 4.5 cm² | Wavelength: 550-1200nm | Colors: Gold, Rose Gold, Champagne | Best for: Premium branding, luxury unboxing experience, high-end retail | Badge: Luxury

## Services (included in OEM/ODM partnerships)

Type: Full-service — one partner from concept to shelf
Minimum order: Flexible — accommodates startups through enterprise programs
Typical lead time (concept to prototype): 1-4 weeks

What is included:
- OEM (build to spec): Client provides design, iShine manufactures to exact specifications
- ODM (design and build): iShine develops product from concept based on client requirements
- Custom packaging and branding: Box design, logo printing, user manual translation
- Compliance documentation: FDA 510(k) submission support, CE technical file, MDSAP docs, RoHS/REACH reports
- Quality control: In-process inspection, final QC, batch testing
- Logistics: FOB Shenzhen, CIF available, warehousing, drop-ship programs

Capabilities offered:
- Concept design and industrial design: https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/services/product-design
- Rapid prototyping and tooling: https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/services/product-design
- Large-scale production and assembly: https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/services/production-assembly
- Custom packaging and branding: https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/services/packaging-logistics
- OEM/ODM full-service overview: https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/services/oem-odm

## Components

- IPL Components Catalog: https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/components
  Scope: Xenon lamp cartridges, optical filters, cooling systems, power supplies — all available as standalone OEM components

- Lamp Cartridges: https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/components/lamp-cartridges
  Type: Xenon flash lamp | Lifespan: 999,000 flashes | Compatible with all iShine IPL housings

- Optical Filters: https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/components/optical-filters
  Type: Multi-layer coated glass | Wavelength cut: 550nm, 570nm, 600nm options | UV protection: Integrated

- Cooling Systems: https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/components/cooling-system
  Types: Sapphire ice plate (contact cooling), Semiconductor active cooling | Temperature: Chill skin to ~10°C

- Power Supply: https://iplmanufacturer.com/en/components/power-supply
  Specs: Global voltage (100-240V AC) | Output: Customizable DC | Certifications: UL, CE, FCC

## Who iShine serves

- Brand owners launching new IPL product lines
- Product managers expanding existing beauty portfolios
- Sourcing specialists evaluating contract manufacturers
- Retailers developing private-label beauty-tech programs
- Startups needing flexible MOQ and rapid time-to-market

## Expected outcomes for partners

- Speed: 1-4 weeks from concept to working prototype
- Compliance: FDA and CE documentation included in standard process
- Quality: ISO 13485 certified manufacturing; batch testing on every production run
- Flexibility: Custom colors, branding, packaging, and user manuals
- Scale: From pilot runs (500-1000 units) to mass production (50,000+ units)
